channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: FIFA's political entanglements and corruption scandals under scrutiny
item.description: The article explores the deepening controversies surrounding FIFA, the international football governing body, highlighting its entanglements with political figures like former U.S. President Donald Tr...

item.title: Western Cape Reports Over 1,100 Lenacapavir Injections Administered for HIV Prevention
item.description: More than 1,100 individuals in the Western Cape have received the long-acting HIV prevention injection, Lenacapavir, since its June rollout, according to provincial health officials. The province has ...

item.title: Conspiracy Theories Surround Argentina's World Cup 2026 Performance
item.description: The article explores allegations that Argentina's 2026 World Cup campaign has been influenced by biased officiating and unfair advantages. Key claims include contentious VAR decisions, such as allowin...

item.title: Halifax Jazz Festival Cancels Saturday Show After Broken Social Scene Drummer Injures Self
item.description: The Halifax Jazz Festival has canceled its Saturday night performance following the withdrawal of the headline act, Broken Social Scene. The band's drummer, Justin Peroff, fell during a June 26 show a...

item.title: Olise's Suspension Hangs in Balance as FIFA Upholds Yellow Card Decision
item.description: Michael Olise, the Bayern Munich winger, remains one yellow card away from suspension for France’s upcoming FIFA 2026 World Cup quarter-final against Morocco. The International Football Federation (FI...

item.title: Trump's Contradictory Stance at NATO Summit: From Criticism to Unity
item.description: US President Donald Trump delivered a mixed message at the latest NATO summit, swinging from sharp criticism of allies to expressing support for the alliance. Initially, Trump lashed out at NATO membe...

item.title: Palace rejects term extension for Marantan despite request
item.description: The Philippine government's Palace has officially denied extending the active service of Police Brigadier General Hansel Marantan, despite a request from Interior Secretary Jonvic Remulla. Marantan, w...

item.title: Ohangla legend Tony Ndiema's burial delayed due to family losses
item.description: The family of late Ohangla music icon Tony Ndiema has confirmed his burial will take place on Wednesday, August 5, at his ancestral home in Omoche Village, Homa Bay County. The funeral arrangements we...

item.title: Adam Liaw's Dry Vegetable Curry: A Family Staple from India
item.description: This article presents a vegetarian recipe for Adam Liaw’s dry vegetable curry, a staple dish from Indian family meals. The recipe, which takes 30 minutes to an hour to prepare, serves four and include...

item.title: Presidency Refutes Obi’s Claims of Government Targeting
item.description: The Nigerian presidency has dismissed allegations by former Anambra governor Peter Obi that he is being targeted by the federal government, calling his claims false and misleading. In an interview wit...

item.title: Swiss Investor A Squared Holding Targets Full Control of Nawiri Group's Tanzania Safari Assets
item.description: A Squared Holding AG, a Swiss investment firm, intends to acquire sole control of Nawiri Group Limited, a Mauritius-based holding company managing Tanzanian safari and lodge operations. The Fair Compe...

item.title: Global Cooperation in Economy, Politics, and Society Enters a New Era
item.description: Leaders from over 100 nations convened at the Global Summit for Sustainable Development to address pressing economic, political, and social challenges. The summit, held in Geneva, focused on fostering...

item.title: Amnesty International Condemns Detention of Bashir Kurfi Over Comments on Security Crisis
item.description: Amnesty International has condemned the detention of public affairs analyst Dr. Bashir Kurfi, calling it arbitrary and an attack on freedom of expression. Kurfi was detained by Katsina State Police ov...

item.title: Maharashtra Experiences Multiple Tremors in Nanded, Hingoli, and Parbhani
item.description: A recent seismic event has caused multiple tremors in the districts of Nanded, Hingoli, and Parbhani in Maharashtra. According to official sources, the tremors occurred between 1:37 AM and 3:23 AM, re...

item.title: Kenya establishes sovereign wealth fund to manage resource revenues
item.description: President William Ruto has signed the Sovereign Wealth Fund Bill 2026 into law, creating a national investment vehicle to preserve Kenya's natural resource revenues for future generations. The legisla...

item.title: UN Resolution Aims to Combat Neglected Tropical Diseases Globally
item.description: The United Nations has approved a resolution to address neglected tropical diseases, which affect over one billion people worldwide, mainly in low-income regions of Africa, Asia, and Latin America. Th...

item.title: Nigeria's Renaissance Energy aims to revive dormant Niger Delta oil field
item.description: Renaissance Africa Energy has initiated plans to develop the JK oil field in Nigeria's Niger Delta, a former Shell asset first explored in 1967 but left idle for over five decades. The project follows...

item.title: Zuleika Lopez visits the Senate for administrative coordination ahead of her impeachment trial testimony
item.description: Office of the Vice President (OVP) chief-of-staff Zuleika Lopez arrived at the Senate on Thursday, one day after the Senate impeachment court issued a subpoena ad testificandum directing her to testif...

item.title: Leaders Warn Civil Society to Prioritize National Interest Over Foreign Influence
item.description: President Bola Tinubu and Lagos State Governor Babajide Sanwo-Olu have cautioned civil society organisations (CSOs) against undue foreign influence, urging them to ensure Nigeria’s national interest r...

item.title: Winnipeg Jets Partner With Bloomington Bison for ECHL Affiliation
item.description: The Winnipeg Jets and Manitoba Moose have ended their partnership with the Norfolk Admirals after three seasons, announcing a new one-year affiliation agreement with the Bloomington Bison of the ECHL....
